def negative_exception_silenced_in_cleanup_or_finally_block():
    rule_id = "exception_silenced_in_cleanup_or_finally_block"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Exception or return statement inside a finally block silences an in-flight exception from the try body."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
